i18n.title: Admin UI Translations
i18n.desc: Pre-shipped languages: English, Hindi, Spanish, Simplified Chinese, Arabic. Other locales are auto-generated via Microsoft Translator on first request and cached in R2 storage.
i18n.rateLimited: Rate limit reached for this locale (5/day). Try again tomorrow.
i18n.configureFirst: Configure Microsoft Translator credentials in Settings first.
i18n.purgeConfirm: Purge cached locale "{{lang}}"? It will be regenerated on next request.
i18n.staleSubheader_one: {{count}} language needs refresh. Only changed strings will be re-translated.
i18n.staleSubheader_other: {{count}} languages need refresh. Only changed strings will be re-translated.

common.errorLoading: Error loading admin data. Please ensure you are logged in as admin.

databases.title: Database Shards ({{count}})
databases.createDesc: This will create a new Cloudflare D1 database, apply the site schema, and register it. New sites will be assigned to the active shard.
databases.emptyDesc: Create your first shard to start assigning sites to shared databases.
databases.approachingLimit: Database is approaching the 10GB D1 limit ({{size}} GB). Consider creating a new shard.
databases.bindingMissingTitle: Binding not found in worker environment
databases.bindingMissingDesc: This shard's D1 database exists but the worker binding {{binding}} is not available. Sites on this shard will not work until the binding is added.
databases.addToWranglerLong: Add this to your wrangler.toml and redeploy the worker:
databases.addToWranglerShort: Add this to your wrangler.toml and redeploy:
databases.noSitesOnShard: No sites on this shard yet
databases.moveDisabledTooltip: Need at least 2 shards to move sites
databases.howShardsBody: are shared D1 databases that store site-specific data (products, orders, categories, etc.) for multiple sites with row-level isolation.
databases.howActiveBody: New sites are automatically assigned to the currently active shard. Only one shard can be active at a time.
databases.howReconcileBody: Compares estimated usage with actual database size and updates the correction factor for accurate billing.
databases.howMoveBody: Migrates a site's data from one shard to another. The site is briefly locked during migration.
databases.howCapacityBody: Each D1 database supports up to 10GB. Create a new shard when the current one approaches this limit.
databases.moveModalOutro: to a different shard database. The site will be briefly locked during migration.
databases.deleteShardMessage: Delete shard "{{name}}"? This shard must have zero sites.
databases.promptD1:
D1 included quota in GB for {{name}}
(blank = use enterprise plan default)
databases.promptR2:
R2 included quota in GB for {{name}}
(blank = use enterprise plan default)

plans.title: Subscription Plans ({{count}})
plans.featuresPlaceholder:
1 Website
Unlimited Products
Custom Domain
500 MB Database / 5 GB Storage
plans.featuresHint: These features are shared across all billing cycles of this plan.
plans.monthlyPriceHint: This base price is used to auto-calculate all billing cycle totals below.
plans.billingCyclesHint: Enable the cycles you want. Prices are calculated from the monthly price. Add an optional discount for longer durations.
plans.emptyPlans: No plans created yet. Add your first plan above.
plans.invalidMonthly: Please enter a valid monthly price.
plans.noCyclesEnabled: Please enable at least one billing cycle with a Razorpay Plan ID.
plans.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}" and all its billing cycles?

enterprise.title: Enterprise Sites ({{count}})
enterprise.searchPlaceholder: Search by subdomain or brand name...
enterprise.d1Title: D1 included quota in GB. Leave blank to use the enterprise plan default.
enterprise.r2Title: R2 included quota in GB. Leave blank to use the enterprise plan default.
enterprise.noInvoices: No invoices yet. Use "Snapshot" to record current month usage.
enterprise.ratesDesc: Configure the per-GB overage charges for enterprise sites. These rates are used to calculate monthly overage costs.
enterprise.quotaInvalid: D1 and R2 quotas must be a non-negative number of GB (or blank for plan default).
enterprise.quotaInvalidShort: Quotas must be a non-negative number of GB (or blank for plan default).
enterprise.removeMessage: This site will be set back to free plan.
enterprise.snapshotMessage: This will record the current month overage charges for this site.

settings.paymentDesc: Manage your Razorpay public key here. The secret key is managed securely via Cloudflare secrets.
settings.razorpayKeyIdHint: This is your Razorpay public key (starts with rzp_live_ or rzp_test_). It is safe to store here as it is meant to be public.
settings.razorpayKeySecretHint: The secret key is managed via Cloudflare environment secrets (RAZORPAY_KEY_SECRET). Update it in your Cloudflare Workers dashboard.
settings.razorpayWebhookSecretHint: The webhook secret is managed via Cloudflare environment secrets (RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET). Set up a webhook in Razorpay dashboard pointing to your /api/payments/webhook endpoint.
settings.translatorDescPrefix: Platform-paid Microsoft Translator credentials used to power admin-UI translations. The key is encrypted at rest using
settings.translatorDescSuffix: and is never returned in plaintext after saving.
settings.regionHint: Find this in your Azure Translator resource → Keys and Endpoint.
settings.translatorKeyConfigured: A key is configured — paste a new one to replace it
settings.translatorStoredSuffix: . Leave the field as-is to keep the existing key.
settings.enterpriseDesc: Configure the Enterprise "Contact Us" card shown on the plan selection page.
settings.showEnterpriseHint: When enabled, an Enterprise "Contact Us" card will appear alongside your regular plans.
settings.enterpriseMessagePlaceholder: e.g. Need a custom solution for your business? Get in touch with our team for tailored enterprise plans.
settings.enterpriseMessageHint: The message displayed on the Enterprise card. Leave empty for a default message.
settings.contactEmailHint: The email address for the "Contact Us" button on the Enterprise card.
settings.setupStep1: Go to Razorpay Dashboard → Subscriptions → Plans
settings.setupStep2: Create plans for each tier and billing cycle (e.g., Starter Monthly, Starter Yearly, etc.)
settings.setupStep3: Copy the Plan ID (e.g., plan_XXXXXX) for each plan
settings.setupStep4: Go to the "Plans" tab above and add each plan with its Razorpay Plan ID
settings.setupStep5: Enter your Razorpay public key above
settings.setupStep6Prefix: In Razorpay Dashboard → Settings → Webhooks, add your webhook URL:
settings.setupStep7: Select webhook events: subscription.activated, subscription.charged, subscription.cancelled
settings.setupStep8: Add the webhook secret to Cloudflare as RAZORPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET
